title: Research wheelchair-accessible vacation rentals in Outer Banks
description: Need someone to research and compile a list of wheelchair-accessible vacation rentals in the Outer Banks area for a family trip this summer. Looking for properties with roll-in showers, wide doorways, and accessible outdoor spaces.

title: Adaptive clothing alterations for sensory-sensitive child
description: My 8-year-old has sensory processing challenges and needs clothing altered — removing tags, flattening seams, and adding soft waistbands to 5-6 pairs of pants and shirts. Must be comfortable with adaptive clothing needs.

title: Offering respite care on weekends — experienced caregiver
description: Experienced caregiver and mom of a child with cerebral palsy. I have weekend availability and would love to offer respite care for families in the Portland area. Comfortable with mobility aids, feeding tubes, and communication devices.
